nodes.norm_label: meta per-user marketing frequency cap (~2 per 24h, error 131049)

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant SaaS Restaurant WhatsApp Platform
nodes.description: SaaS platform where restaurants run delivery ops via WhatsApp: ordering, menu digitization, rider dispatch, live tracking, smart batching, ML demand predictions, marketing automation, manager dashboard.

nodes.label: COD Only Payment Rule
nodes.description: Cash on delivery is the only accepted payment method. No card, no wallet, no online payment. Non-negotiable.

nodes.label: Delivery Fee Tiers
nodes.description: Fee tiers: ≤3 km free, 3-5 km AED 5, >5 km AED 10. Canonical implementation in geo/fees.py delivery_fee_aed().

nodes.label: SLA 40-Minute Customer Promise
nodes.description: 40 min customer-facing SLA. 30 min internal target. 10 min buffer per batched order. SLA events: yellow_30, red_35, breach_40. Clock starts at order confirmation, resets on confirmed modification.

nodes.label: Late Delivery Auto-Coupon Rule
nodes.description: Late delivery (>40 min, system/rider fault) triggers automatic coupon. Exception: weather delay disclosed at order time → no coupon. Code format: SORRY-{restaurant_id}-{hex}, 30-day expiry.

nodes.label: Riders Cannot Reject Assignments
nodes.description: Riders are employees — no accept/reject step in dispatch. Manager can deactivate rider from future assignment. Assignment is atomic.

nodes.label: Menu Activation Rules
nodes.description: Dish numbers mandatory. Menu activation blocked if any dish lacks number or price. Descriptions max 3 lines, never include price. Re-upload diff by (dish_number, name) with manager confirmation.

nodes.label: Cancelled-After-Cooking Resale Rule
nodes.description: Cancellation after cooking started → order auto-listed for resale (status on_resale). Excluded from same phone/person/address. FSM: on_resale → resold | written_off.

nodes.label: Order Modification SLA Reset Rule
nodes.description: Order modification allowed only before ready/picked_up. Restarts 40-min SLA clock after customer confirms new ETA.

nodes.label: Modular Monolith Architecture
nodes.description: FastAPI + async SQLAlchemy 2 + Celery. Bounded contexts: identity, menu, conversation, ordering, dispatch, marketing, predictions, whatsapp, llm, geo, audit, outbox. Routers never touch other modules' models.

nodes.label: Transactional Outbox Pattern
nodes.description: Every outbound WhatsApp message written transactionally to outbox_messages. Delivered by Celery worker with retry + dead-letter. Status: pending|sent|failed|dead. Max 3 attempts.

nodes.label: Order FSM — 14 States
nodes.description: draft → pending_confirmation → confirmed → preparing → ready → assigned → picked_up → arriving → delivered | cancelled | undeliverable | on_resale → resold | written_off. Illegal transitions raise. All transitions audited.

nodes.label: Append-Only Audit Log
nodes.description: audit_log table: actor (system|manager|rider|customer), restaurant_id, entity, entity_id, action, before/after JSONB, ts. Every state change calls audit/service.py:record_audit in same transaction.

nodes.label: Idempotent Webhook Processing
nodes.description: webhook_events table keyed by provider message ID. Duplicates ignored. Replay window freshness check.

nodes.label: Graceful Degradation
nodes.description: LLM down → dish-number-only matching + manager alert. Maps down → haversine + static speed model. WhatsApp template rejected → fallback pre-approved template. Manual override everywhere.

nodes.label: JWT Authentication (HS256 + argon2id)
nodes.description: JWT HS256 with aud+iss claims enforcement. argon2id password hashing. Multi-tenant: restaurant row IS the manager account. Tenant resolved via identity/deps.py:current_restaurant.

nodes.label: Core Database Schema
nodes.description: Tables: restaurants, manager_users, riders, menus, dishes, customers, customer_addresses, conversations, messages, orders, order_items, batches, batch_orders, rider_locations, assignments, sla_events, coupons, cod_collections, rider_shift_reconciliations, prediction_runs, model_registry, manager_overrides, wa_templates, campaigns, segments, automations, recurring_message_state, audit_log, outbox_messages, webhook_events.

nodes.label: Platform Actors
nodes.description: Customer: orders via WhatsApp, never sees app/website. Rider: employee, receives assignments, shares location, completes deliveries via WhatsApp. Manager: onboards restaurant, confirms menu, watches dashboard. Background jobs: dispatch, SLA, schedulers, ML, marketing, outbox.

nodes.label: Customer Ordering Conversation Flow
nodes.description: Greeting → send digital menu (formatted, never raw PDF) → dish capture (pg_trgm fuzzy match + abbreviation expansion) → cart build → address capture (location pin + apt/room + building + receiver) → order confirmation → dispatch.

nodes.label: Dispatch Engine Flow
nodes.description: Nearest rider by composite score (distance + workload + on-time %). No accept/reject. Atomic assignment. Batch max 3 orders, 10-min window, +10 min SLA buffer per stop. Greedy proximity algorithm.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Webhook Verification
nodes.description: GET handshake: validate hub.verify_token, return hub.challenge. POST: HMAC-SHA256 signature via X-Hub-Signature-256 header using app_secret. Idempotency via wa_message_id.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Customer Service Window (CSW)
nodes.description: 24-hour rolling window triggered by any customer message. Free-form messages only allowed within CSW. After 24h, only pre-approved templates can be sent.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Per-Message Pricing (PMP)
nodes.description: Post July 1, 2025 Meta pricing change: per-message pricing (PMP). Previously per-conversation pricing. Free entry points from Click-to-WhatsApp ads.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Template Management
nodes.description: Create/approve/reject/delete lifecycle. 30-day name reuse blackout after deletion. 100/WABA/hour create rate limit. body ≤1024 chars, footer ≤60 chars. Ephemeral templates auto-delete end-of-day.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Media Expiry Rules
nodes.description: Media URL: 5-minute expiry. Uploaded media ID: 30-day expiry. Inbound media ID: 7-day expiry. Must re-upload or refresh before sending.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Throughput Limits
nodes.description: Default 80 MPS (messages per second). Auto-upgrade to 1000 MPS available. Load test SLO: webhook p95 < 250ms, ≥200 RPS sustained.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Message Types
nodes.description: Inbound: text, button_reply, list_reply, location, image, status callbacks. Outbound: text, interactive buttons (max 3), list messages (max 10 rows), location request, image, template. Location request uses interactive location_request_message type.

nodes.label: Phase 0-1 Foundation TDD Plan
nodes.description: 18-task TDD implementation plan: project scaffold, settings, DB layer, audit log, FastAPI app, Alembic, Celery, identity models, auth service (argon2+JWT), signup/login endpoints, LLM extractor port, menu models, menu upload, dish edit, menu activation, re-upload diff, availability toggle, riders+settings.

nodes.label: Restaurant Default Settings
nodes.description: DEFAULT_SETTINGS in identity models includes delivery_fee_tiers (canonical 3-tier structure), max_radius_km=10, max_orders_per_batch, max_items_per_order.

nodes.label: Phase 2 WhatsApp Core TDD Plan
nodes.description: 14-task plan: WhatsApp port dataclasses, MockProvider, CloudAPIProvider, provider factory, payload normalizer, conversation/outbox/webhook_events tables, outbox service+worker, conversation service, conversation engine, webhook router, Celery dispatch, web simulator.

nodes.label: MockProvider for WhatsApp
nodes.description: Stores sends in-memory, exposes drain_sends()/inject_inbound() for tests. Used when APP_WHATSAPP_PROVIDER=mock. Never hits real APIs in tests.

nodes.label: CloudAPIProvider
nodes.description: httpx-based, Meta Graph API v21/v23/v25. HMAC-SHA256 verification. Handles all 7 WhatsApp message types including auto-uploading base64 media. Used in production.

nodes.label: Outbox Worker
nodes.description: _deliver_one with status pending|sent|failed|dead. Max 3 attempts. Exponential backoff [30, 120, 600]s. Atomic row claim via UPDATE...RETURNING.

nodes.label: Phase 3 Ordering TDD Plan
nodes.description: Tasks 1-7+: Customer+CustomerAddress models, Order+OrderItem models, OrderFSM (14 states), pg_trgm fuzzy matching, haversine+fees, LLM ordering ports (Describer/IntentClassifier/Arbiter), conversation engine ordering states.

nodes.label: pg_trgm Trigram Fuzzy Dish Matching
nodes.description: GIN index on dishes.name_normalized. MatchConfidence: DIRECT (>0.6), AMBIGUOUS (gap <0.15), NO_MATCH (<0.6). parse_qty_and_text handles '2x', 'x2', word numbers. Arbiter LLM resolves ambiguous matches.

nodes.label: OrderStatus Enum
nodes.description: DRAFT, PENDING_CONFIRMATION, CONFIRMED, PREPARING, READY, ASSIGNED, PICKED_UP, ARRIVING, DELIVERED, CANCELLED, UNDELIVERABLE, ON_RESALE, RESOLD, WRITTEN_OFF.

nodes.label: Phase 4 Logistics TDD Plan
nodes.description: Tasks 1-10+: GeoPort protocol, FakeGeoProvider (haversine + 25 km/h static speed), GoogleMapsGeoProvider stub, dispatch models, SLA models, Coupon model, COD models, canonical geo fees, rider scoring, order batching, dispatch engine, delivery FSM, rider location updates.

nodes.label: Rider Dispatch Scoring Algorithm
nodes.description: Composite score: distance + workload + on-time_pct. Nearest rider wins. No accept/reject. Atomic assignment. algorithm_score JSONB stored for explainability.

nodes.label: Greedy Batch Builder
nodes.description: Max 3 orders per batch. 10-min window. +10 min SLA buffer per additional stop. Greedy proximity. 30-min internal SLA target. Inter-stop travel time calculation.

nodes.label: delivery_fee_aed() Canonical Fee Calculator
nodes.description: Canonical implementation in geo/fees.py. ≤3 km → 0, 3-5 km → AED 5, >5 km → AED 10. Also exists in ordering/fees.py (settings-driven). geo/fees.py is the authoritative source.

nodes.label: Phase 5 Dashboard TDD Plan
nodes.description: React dashboard: Vite 5, React 18, TypeScript 5, React Router 6, plain fetch client, Vitest, Playwright. Dark 'tactical operations' design: #0d0f12 canvas, DM Mono + IBM Plex Sans fonts. Tasks: scaffold, design tokens, API client, auth store, SLA math, transport abstraction, components, app shell, orders data layer.

nodes.label: Dashboard SLA Color Semantics
nodes.description: safe (>15 min remaining), warn (10-15 min), critical (<10 min), breach (≤0). usePoll hook via PollingTransport with swappable transport interface.

nodes.label: PollingTransport Swappable Interface
nodes.description: usePoll hook, PollingTransport implements swappable realtime transport interface. Designed for future WebSocket upgrade. Vite dev server proxies /api to port 9001.

nodes.label: Phase 6 Predictions + Marketing TDD Plan
nodes.description: 20-task plan: ML demand predictions (pure numpy RollingAverageModel, ForecastModel protocol) and marketing automation (UAE 09:00-18:00 window, 2/user/24h cap, STOP opt-out, template compliance).

nodes.label: RollingAverageModel — Pure Numpy
nodes.description: weekday × hour × dish rolling mean. Cold-start fallback to dish global mean. ForecastModel protocol for LightGBM upgrade path. ForecastAdjuster LLM port for plain-English overrides.

nodes.label: Marketing Compliance Rules
nodes.description: UAE 09:00-18:00 send window (Cabinet Decision 56/2024). 2 msg/user/24h Meta cap. error 131049 suppression. STOP keyword opt-out. Datestamped template names with 30-day reuse blackout. Body ≤1024, footer ≤60 chars, no emoji, opt-out mechanism required.

nodes.label: Marketing Segment DSL
nodes.description: Validated DSL, no eval/raw SQL. Only 5 fields and bounded ops compile to SQLAlchemy. Audience segment definition for campaigns. LLM compiles plain-English → DSL.

nodes.label: Phase 7 Hardening TDD Plan
nodes.description: 17-task production hardening plan: outbox sweeper (exponential backoff [30,120,600]s), atomic row claim (UPDATE...RETURNING), webhook timestamp fix, passlib→argon2-cffi, JWT aud/iss claims, menu file blob store, structlog JSON logging + RequestIDMiddleware, Prometheus metrics, redis token-bucket rate limiter, webhook replay window, security headers + CORS.

nodes.label: Prometheus Metrics
nodes.description: 5 metrics covered: webhook p95 SLO, http_request_duration_seconds histogram, outbox_deliveries_total. Grafana dashboard auto-imports JSON files every 30s from /var/lib/grafana/dashboards.

nodes.label: Redis Token-Bucket Rate Limiter
nodes.description: Token-bucket algorithm implemented in Redis. Applied to webhook and API endpoints. Part of Phase 7 hardening.

nodes.label: Security Headers Middleware
nodes.description: Path-specific CSP with simulator carve-out for unsafe-inline. CORS configuration. RequestIDMiddleware for structlog JSON logging correlation.

nodes.label: AI Marketing Opt-out Implementation Plan
nodes.description: 2-task plan: add is_optout_intent() phrase-matcher and record_opt_in() to marketing/optout.py. Patch conversation engine to check both is_stop_keyword and is_optout_intent before dialogue routing.

nodes.label: Natural Language Opt-out Phrases
nodes.description: Multi-word phrases: 'stop sending', 'stop messaging', 'dont send', 'no more messages', 'opt out', 'opt-out', 'remove me', 'unsubscribe me', 'dont contact', etc. Case-insensitive substring match. Single-word 'stop' handled by is_stop_keyword(), not is_optout_intent().

nodes.label: record_opt_in() Function
nodes.description: Removes opt-out record via DELETE on OptOut table. Idempotent — safe when no row exists. Required for Customer Profile marketing toggle. Added to marketing/optout.py.

nodes.label: Customer Profile Screen Implementation Plan
nodes.description: 6-task plan: CustomerProfileOut schema (id, name, phone, total_orders, total_spend, first/last_order_at, marketing_opted_in, tags, addresses, recent_orders), customer_router.py endpoints, CustomerProfileScreen React component, CustomersScreen list, routing+nav.

nodes.label: Customer Profile API Endpoints
nodes.description: GET /api/v1/ordering/customers (list, q search), GET /api/v1/ordering/customers/{id} (profile), PATCH /{id} (edit), PATCH /{id}/addresses/{addr_id} (edit), DELETE /{id}/addresses/{addr_id} (delete — blocks if open order).

nodes.label: Address Delete Blocked by Open Order
nodes.description: Cannot delete a customer address if it is linked to any open order (statuses: draft, pending_confirmation, confirmed, preparing, ready, assigned, picked_up, arriving). Returns 409.
nodes.norm_label: address delete blocked by open order

nodes.label: Full-AI Phase-Aware Conversation Agent Plan
nodes.description: 11-task plan: Replace hybrid FSM/AI with single DeepSeekConversationAgent owning entire customer dialogue. 7 languages. Outbound messages stored in DB. Real conversation history (last 10 turns). Returning customer address reuse. Phase guards server-side.

nodes.label: Conversation Agent Phases
nodes.description: 4 phases: ordering (greeting → menu Q&A → item collection → upsell), address_capture (location pin → apt/room → building → receiver), awaiting_confirmation (show summary → confirm/modify/cancel), post_order (status queries, modification, cancellation).

nodes.label: take_action Tool Schema
nodes.description: Single forced tool: take_action. Actions: add_item, remove_item, update_qty, proceed_to_address, send_location_request, save_address_text, use_saved_address, proceed_to_confirmation, confirm_order, request_modification, cancel_order, status_query, no_action. Always requires 'action' + 'reply'.

nodes.label: 7-Language Support
nodes.description: English, Arabic (عربي), Urdu/Hindi (اردو/हिंदी), Turkish, Russian, Filipino (Tagalog), Malayalam (മലയാളം). Auto-detect and match customer language. If they mix languages, match their mix.

nodes.label: Server-Side Phase Guards
nodes.description: _is_valid_action_for_phase() validates action against current phase. Wrong-phase action falls back to no_action. _PHASE_ACTIONS: ordering frozenset, address_capture frozenset, awaiting_confirmation frozenset, post_order frozenset.

nodes.label: _build_history — DB Conversation History
nodes.description: Fetches last N (default 10) messages ordered by ts. Maps inbound text → user, outbound text → assistant, inbound location → '[customer shared location pin: lat,lng]', inbound button_reply → '[tapped: title]'. History always starts with user turn.

nodes.label: _resolve_phase — Legacy State Mapping
nodes.description: _PHASE_MAP maps legacy dialogue_state values to new phases: greeting/menu_sent/collecting_items → ordering, address_capture/address_text_pending/receiver_details → address_capture, order_confirmation → awaiting_confirmation, order_placed → post_order.

nodes.label: Returning Customer Address Reuse
nodes.description: In address_capture phase, _build_context looks up most recently used CustomerAddress. If found, offers 'Use your saved address — {apt}, {building}? Or share a new location'. use_saved_address action confirms reuse.

nodes.label: Radius from restaurant.settings (Not Hardcoded)
nodes.description: max_radius_km read from restaurant.settings['max_radius_km'], not hardcoded. Enforced at location pin processing in _handle_location_pin. Outside radius → polite rejection, conversation reset.

nodes.label: Shorthand Order Handling
nodes.description: Handles: '2 bry + karahi' → two add_item calls, 'ek biryani dena bhai' → qty=1, 'bhai no onion' → special_note='no onion', 'extra spicy plz' → special_note, 'rm that'/'cancel last' → remove_item, 'make it 3' → update_qty, 'bas'/'khalaas'/'done'/'checkout' → proceed_to_address.

nodes.label: Full-AI Conversation Agent Design Spec
nodes.description: Approved spec replacing hybrid FSM/AI. Phases: ordering/address_capture/awaiting_confirmation/post_order. tool: take_action (forced). History from DB (last 10 turns). Rider path unchanged.

nodes.label: Item Variants / Sizes Implementation Plan
nodes.description: 5-task plan: optional per-dish variants with own prices (e.g. Regular/Family). Variants JSONB on Dish. variant_name snapshots on OrderItem. One follow-up question backend-owned. AI tool schema unchanged — backend resolves variant. Backward compatible: empty variants = today's behavior.

nodes.label: Dish Variants Architecture
nodes.description: variants JSONB on Dish: [{name, price_aed, dish_number?}]. base Dish.price_aed = default/from price (stays NOT NULL). OrderItem.variant_name snapshots chosen variant. Activation guard: variant without name/price blocks activation. Merge rule: same dish_id + same variant_name merges qty.

nodes.label: awaiting_variant Conversation Sub-State
nodes.description: Sub-state inside collecting_items routing. Holds {dish_id, qty}. Next message resolves variant via fuzzy matcher. Re-asks once on miss, then defaults to first/cheapest variant. Greeting/STOP/reset clears awaiting_variant + variant_retries.

nodes.label: Manual Order Creation (Dashboard) Implementation Plan
nodes.description: 5-task plan: managers place delivery orders for walk-in/phone customers from dashboard. Two new endpoints, create_manual_order service function, NewOrderScreen React component. Created order enters same FSM as bot orders + sends WhatsApp confirmation.

nodes.label: Manual Order Endpoints
nodes.description: GET /api/v1/orders/manual/customer-lookup?phone= → CustomerLookupOut (name + last_address). POST /api/v1/orders/manual → OrderOut. Errors: 422 on no active menu, unavailable dish, empty items, missing phone. Manager JWT required.

nodes.label: create_manual_order Service Function
nodes.description: Verifies active menu, validates dish IDs, get_or_create_customer, upsert_address, add_item for each item, finalize_confirmation, enqueue WhatsApp confirmation via outbox. Reuses existing service primitives.

nodes.label: Manual Order Design Spec
nodes.description: Use case: walk-in / phone customer. Manager enters phone, delivery details, picks items from active menu. Customer gets WhatsApp confirmation. All status updates same as bot-placed order.

nodes.label: Order Detail Enhancement Implementation Plan
nodes.description: Wide tabbed drawer: Overview (items/address/rider/totals/COD), Timeline (audit log + Leaflet GPS route map), Chat (WhatsApp bubbles), Customer (inline editable form + marketing opt-in toggle). GET /orders/{id}/detail endpoint assembles all data server-side.

nodes.label: OrderDetailOut Schema Hierarchy
nodes.description: OrderDetailOut: id, order_number, status, items (OrderItemDetailOut with line_total computed_field), address (AddressDetailOut), customer (CustomerDetailOut with marketing_opted_in), rider (RiderDetailOut), subtotal, delivery_fee_aed, total, created_at, delivered_at, sla_deadline, timeline (TimelineEventOut list), chat (ChatMessageOut list), route (GpsPingOut list).

nodes.label: Customer/Address Patch Endpoints
nodes.description: PATCH /api/v1/ordering/customers/{id} → CustomerDetailOut (edit name, phone, marketing_opted_in). PATCH /api/v1/ordering/customers/{id}/addresses/{addr_id} → AddressDetailOut. service functions: patch_customer(), patch_address(), toggle_marketing_opt().

nodes.label: Order Detail + Customer Profile + AI Opt-out Design Spec
nodes.description: Sub-project A: wide 60% viewport side drawer with 4 tabs. Sub-project B: /customers/:id profile screen. Sub-project C: natural-language opt-out in conversation engine. All three approved 2026-06-10.
nodes.norm_label: order detail + customer profile + ai opt-out design spec

nodes.label: UAT Checklist
nodes.description: Non-technical tester checklist covering: manager onboarding (A), menu digitization (B), customer ordering (C), delivery fee tiers (D-E), SLA and late coupon (F), WhatsApp opt-out (G), manager dashboard. Validates spec sections. Fake-extractor note for LLM provider in test env.

nodes.label: Load / Stress Test Harness (Locust)
nodes.description: Three user classes: WebhookBurstUser (weight 5), DashboardPollUser (weight 2), SendFloodUser (weight 1). SLOs: webhook p95 < 250ms, error rate < 0.5%, /auth/login p95 < 400ms (argon2 cost), GET /orders p95 < 300ms, outbox throughput ≥ 50 msg/s, ≥ 200 RPS sustained for 5 min.

nodes.label: Load Test HMAC Signed Webhooks
nodes.description: When APP_WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET set, harness computes hmac_sha256(app_secret, body) per request. APP_WHATSAPP_VERIFY_SIGNATURE=false toggle for raw-capacity testing only. Production must keep signature verification on.

nodes.label: Grafana Dashboard Auto-Provisioning
nodes.description: Provider 'restaurant-ops' in orgId 1, folder 'Restaurant Ops'. Type file. updateIntervalSeconds: 30. Path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards. foldersFromFilesStructure: false. editable: true.

nodes.label: Frontend index.html — Ops Terminal
nodes.description: Title: 'Ops Terminal'. viewport width=1440 (fixed width, not responsive — designed for desktop ops use). Entry point: /src/main.tsx. React app mounts at #root.

nodes.label: FakeConversationAgent — New Interface
nodes.description: Test double for phase-aware port. respond() accepts restaurant_name, dialogue_phase, history, context. Returns deterministic ConversationAgentResult based on last user message and dialogue_phase. Used in all conversation tests.

nodes.label: Upsell Once Per Order Rule
nodes.description: Upsell only once per order — only if cart has ≥1 item and agent hasn't already suggested. Natural, not pushy. Example: 'Want to add a drink? 😊'.

nodes.label: CustomersScreen — List Page
nodes.description: List page at /customers route. Search by name/phone (client-side filter). CompactTable with columns: Name, Phone, Orders, Spend, Marketing. Row click → navigate to /customers/:id. Added to NavSidebar after Orders.

nodes.label: Variant Activation Guard
nodes.description: A dish whose variants list has an entry without a name or price blocks menu activation — mirrors existing 'dish lacks number/price' rule. Activation completeness check in menu/service.py iterates variants.
